title: 论文提炼｜Understanding Co-running Behaviors on Integrated CPU/GPU Architectures
content:
论文名称：Understanding Co-running Behaviors on Integrated CPU/GPU Architectures
研究主题：大模型推理、检索增强与记忆系统
发表 venue：TPDS - IEEE Transactions on Parallel and Distributed Systems (TPDS)
发表年份：2016
作者：Feng Zhang, Jidong Zhai, Bingsheng He, Shuhao Zhang, Wenguang Chen
作者角色：合作作者或共同作者
一句话总结：Integrated CPU/GPU architectures make co-running a promising execution mode, but not all programs benefit from jointly using both processors.
核心内容：
Integrated CPU/GPU architectures make co-running a promising execution mode, but not all programs benefit from jointly using both processors. This work studies co-running behaviors on AMD and Intel integrated architectures across Rodinia, Parboil, and Polybench workloads. The analysis shows that architectural differences between CPUs and GPUs together with limited shared memory bandwidth are the two main constraints on co-running efficiency. Based on these observations, the work further develops a decision-tree-based predictor for co-run friendliness and a profiling-based model for workload partitioning, enabling more effective use of integrated architectures.
适合回答的问题：
- 这篇论文主要解决什么问题，以及它为什么重要。
- 这篇论文的核心方法、系统设计或算法思路是什么。
- 这篇论文与 大模型推理、检索增强与记忆系统 这条研究主线的关系是什么。
